spec_match.rationale: The concept is outstanding, linking client-side form submissions to live JWT generation and showing the specific headers (Sec-Email-Verification-Nonce) in detail.

interactive.rationale: Extremely interactive, featuring a 4-step wizard that consumes custom input text, splits signed JWT anatomy dynamically, and lets developers simulate replay protection blocks.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly represents the entire lifecycle of browser-mediated OTP replacement.

edge_cases.rationale: Dedicates separate sections to replay protection and shows the exact javascript fallback snippet when 'emailVerification' is not in navigator.

references.rationale: Correctly cites a ChromeStatus reference (5091473867104256) in the footer see-also block.

design_system.rationale: Highly conformant, featuring responsive column grids, clean monospace layouts, and high-contrast borders.

openQuestions.title: Consolidate ChromeStatus entry references
openQuestions.detail: This concept page links to chromestatus.com/feature/5091473867104256 while the parent feature index points to 5205725253074944. Double-check whether they should be aligned to the same feature entry or if both are intended.

summary: The verification-flow-demo is a premier developer demonstration of the Email Verification Protocol. It provides excellent interactive step-by-step states, header inspect panels, and a replay-attack validation matrix.
